title: Lead Frontend Developer at Swiggy Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at Swiggy Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Swiggy Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Swiggy Digital Technologies:
Swiggy Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Digital Technologies!
